payload.body:
Done. Changes:

- LICENSE-MIT and LICENSE-APACHE added at repo root (dual-license, Rust ecosystem default).
- Internal crates declared in [workspace.dependencies] with version + path so cargo publish accepts them and local dev still uses path.
- All 10 publishable crates (cargo-trust, trust, trust-attrs, trust-diag, trust-lints, trust-lower, trust-lsp, trust-rustc, trust-rustdoc, trust-std, trust-syntax) updated: switched internal deps to .workspace = true, added keywords (5 per crate) and categories. xtask correctly retains publish = false.
- Verified: cargo check --workspace passes. cargo publish --dry-run -p trust-attrs and -p cargo-trust both clean (these are the leaves; pass through the full verify step). The other 9 hit 'no matching package named X found' — that's not a metadata bug, it's the registry-order problem RT-58 owns (cargo won't fully verify a crate whose deps aren't published yet).

Publish-order plan documented in RT-58 description. RT-55 unblocks RT-58 as planned.
